name: Twilight Imp Zant
description:
The supposed-to-be ruler of the Twilight Realm! Bested by Link and Midna, Zant had his powers stripped from him, and body transformed. Now banished to the human realm, powerless and stuck in a diminutive body, Zant must adapt to his new surroundings.

Original design belongs to Nedoiko.
creator: WhacktheCat
